grouping_method: Groq LLM grouping on a sample + TF-IDF similarity assignment for full dataset
grouping_prompt:
You are a software requirements analyst.

Task:
Group the given Headspace app user reviews into EXACTLY 5 non-overlapping groups.

Rules:
- Each review_id in this input must appear in exactly ONE group (no duplicates across groups).
- Every provided review_id in this input must be assigned to one of the 5 groups (no omissions).
- Each group must represent a distinct user problem or user need.
- Each group must contain at least 10 review_ids.
- Use only the provided review_ids. Do NOT invent or modify any IDs.
- Theme must be concise (5–10 words) and clearly describe the issue.

Output Requirements:
- Return ONLY valid JSON (no explanations, no extra text).
- Do NOT include markdown code blocks.
- The output MUST contain exactly 5 groups.

Schema:
{
  "groups": [
    { "group_id": "A1", "theme": "...", "review_ids": ["rev_..."], "example_reviews": ["...", "..."] },
    { "group_id": "A2", "theme": "...", "review_ids": ["rev_..."], "example_reviews": ["...", "..."] },
    { "group_id": "A3", "theme": "...", "review_ids": ["rev_..."], "example_reviews": ["...", "..."] },
    { "group_id": "A4", "theme": "...", "review_ids": ["rev_..."], "example_reviews": ["...", "..."] },
    { "group_id": "A5", "theme": "...", "review_ids": ["rev_..."], "example_reviews": ["...", "..."] }
  ]
}

Additional Constraints:
- example_reviews must be short quotes (max 200 characters each).
- Quotes must come from the provided reviews (do not invent).
- Keep groups balanced and meaningful (not random splits).
persona_prompt:
You are helping a software requirements class project.
Given a review group (theme + example reviews + review ids), create ONE persona.
Do NOT invent details not supported by the reviews.
IMPORTANT: Persona name must be unique and specific (NOT generic like "Frustrated User").
Return ONLY JSON with this structure:
{
  "id": "P_auto_X",
  "name": "Unique persona name",
  "description": "1-2 sentences",
  "derived_from_group": "A#",
  "goals": ["..."],
  "pain_points": ["..."],
  "context": ["..."],
  "constraints": ["..."],
  "evidence_reviews": ["rev_...", "rev_..."]
}
Keep lists short (3-5 items). Evidence reviews must be ids from the group.
